market.summary: The global art market showed a 4% YoY growth in 2025 to $59.6 billion. 2026 sees cautious optimism with strong high-end sales and the dominance of the US (44% share) and the critical return of international collectors to major Asian events.
keyTrends: Art fairs represent 35% of dealer turnover (highest since 2022)
Shift towards high-value transactions; online sales softening

highlights: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 VIP Preview days (Mar 25-26) signal strong market confidence
Major sales at ABHK include Picasso (€3.5M), Liu Ye ($3.8M), and Marlene Dumas ($3.5M)
New 'Echoes' sector and Asian debut of 'Zero10' digital initiative at ABHK
Continued pressure from rising operational costs and geopolitical headwinds
Fair open to public: Mar 27-29 at HKCEC
